AT0023.title: Automation Scripts
AT0023.description: Automation scripts automate repetitive operations that would otherwise require manual execution through code. In many cases, they do not involve exploiting system vulnerabilities but simply automate manual operations through machines, a common means for developers to improve daily work efficiency. In the black-grey market, automation scripts are commonly used for batch registration, automated traffic inflation, grabbing red packets, snapping up coupons, auto-order grabbing, and other scenarios, serving as an important tool for black-grey market actors to achieve scaled cheating.

references.title: ICBC Releases 2022 Cyber Financial Black Market Research Report
